finding: www.noetfield.com served untracked, never-committed /structure/ page — deploy route bypasses git and review entirely

evidence.publish_mechanism: Noetfield/scripts/deploy-www-cloudflare.sh — direct-upload `wrangler pages deploy` of the working tree to Cloudflare Pages project noetfield-www
evidence.caller_sweep: only .github/workflows/noetfield-www-ci.yml references it in repo surfaces; CI cannot deploy uncommitted files, so the /structure/ publish was a local working-tree invocation
evidence.brain_loop: com.sina.brain-loop-autorun-v1 launchd loop present but no www-deploy reference found in its chain — left untouched

actions_taken: deploy_fence() guard added to Noetfield/scripts/deploy-www-cloudflare.sh: blocks deploy when working tree is dirty/untracked, branch != main, or HEAD != origin/main; NF_WWW_FOUNDER_OVERRIDE=1 escape hatch for founder-supervised deploys
residual_risk: raw `npx wrangler pages deploy` invoked outside the script bypasses the fence — strict option: move CF Pages token out of the Mac vault
fence is uncommitted until the next founder-visible commit
review_point_after_fence: PR to protected main (founder merge) is the only sanctioned path
